prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Trace how k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime.Object is imported and used across kubernetes/kubernetes. Find all Go source files in the core/v1 API types that implement runtime.Object by embedding TypeMeta and ObjectMeta, and the files in the API machinery that register these types into the scheme.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the kubernetes-ecosystem fixture.
